apis.name: unreal.EditorAssetLibrary.load_asset
apis.description: Load an asset by its object path. Returns None if not found.

apis.name: unreal.KismetEditorUtilities.compile_blueprint
apis.description: Compile a blueprint. Must be called after adding variables/components.

apis.name: unreal.EditorAssetLibrary.save_asset
apis.signature: save_asset(asset_to_save: str, only_if_is_dirty: bool = True) -> bool

apis.name: unreal.EditorAssetLibrary.does_asset_exist
apis.description: Check if an asset exists at the given path.
